title: The Afro Boat Party (Black & White Edition)
venue: Tereza Joanne Boat, King George V Dock
description:
Presented by The PM — Sunday 30 August 2026, 8PM–3AM on the Tereza Joanne Boat at King George V Dock, London E16 2JU. BBQ, DJs, African drummers, and vibes on the water. Dress code: strictly black and/or white.

Tickets from £20 — keep an eye on theonlypm.com and Fixr for the ticket drop.
